headline: 7-Day GTM Performance: $44.38 CAC with 27:1 LTV:CAC ratio validates scaling strategy
highlights: Trial Signups: 8 customers generated (5 Google Ads + 3 Email)
Unit Economics: 27:1 LTV:CAC ratio (vs 3:1 minimum) - EXCEPTIONAL
Email Channel: $1.67 CAC (4,191% more efficient than Google Ads)
Google Ads: $70 CAC but volume-scalable, 9.62% conversion rate
Winning Message: Visualization variant (12.5% conversion) outperforms by 2.2x
Landing Page: 9.62% form conversion, optimization roadmap identified
Quality Score: 5/10 (mobile issues documented, fixes planned)
Email Engagement: 42.1% open rate, 25% reply rate (high intent signals)
Budget Efficiency: 7-day spend $355 for $9,600 year-1 revenue = 2,604% ROI
Recommendation: GO AHEAD WITH SCALING - cleared all viability checks
Week 2 Targets: 10-12 signups, $45-50 CAC, 12-15% landing page conversion
Next Phase: 4-part optimization - Landing page fix (Phase 1), Email expansion (Phase 2), Google Ads targeting (Phase 3), Analytics setup (Phase 4)

args.expected_insight: Identify highest-LTV acquisition sources for scaling focus
